title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Sanji, Pudding, Luffy as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it okay if I go inside for a bit to talk to Luffy and his friend?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Let us out! We've been caught!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Okay then, I am inserting the bookmark!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Oi, pudding! We went to that coast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep it down, Luffy! There are other people listening too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My brothers and sisters... they must've done terrible things to you two.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm also incredibly sorry... that I couldn't make it to the coast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hmmm? What is she whispering about?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I also know that he only did that because he's a kind man.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'll deep down, I can tell that I'm the one that's screwing everything up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So don't worry... I won't be marrying Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, pudding, wait!! What the hell are you saying?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
